name: Следопыт
hitPointsAtHigherLevels: d10 (or 6) + your Constitution modifier per Ranger level after 1st
description: Воин дикой природы, мастер выживания и следопытства. Непревзойдённый охотник.

classFeatures.name: Spellcasting
classFeatures.description: You have learned to channel the magical essence of nature to cast spells. See {@variantrule chapter 7|XPHB} for the rules on spellcasting. The information below details how you use those rules with Ranger spells, which appear on the {@filter Ranger spell list} later in the class's description.

details.spellSlots: The Ranger Features table shows how many spell slots you have to cast your level 1+ spells. You regain all expended spell slots when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
details.preparedSpells: You prepare the list of level 1+ spells that are available for you to cast with this feature. To start, choose two level 1 Ranger spells. {@spell Cure Wounds|XPHB} and {@spell Ensnaring Strike|XPHB} are recommended. The number of spells on your list increases as you gain Ranger levels, as shown in the Prepared Spells column of the Ranger Features table. Whenever that number increases, choose additional Ranger spells until the number of spells on your list matches the number on the table. The chosen spells must be of a level for which you have spell slots. If another Ranger feature gives you spells that you always have prepared, those spells don't count against the number of spells you can prepare with this feature, but those spells otherwise count as Ranger spells for you.
details.changingPreparedSpells: Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can change your list of prepared spells, replacing any of the spells there with other Ranger spells for which you have spell slots.
details.spellcastingAbility: Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for your Ranger spells.
details.spellcastingFocus: You can use a {@item Druidic Focus|XPHB} as a {@variantrule Spellcasting Focus|XPHB} for your Ranger spells.

classFeatures.name: Favored Enemy
classFeatures.description: You always have the {@spell Hunter's Mark|XPHB} spell prepared. You can cast it twice without expending a spell slot, and you regain all expended uses of this ability when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. The number of times you can cast the spell without a spell slot increases when you reach certain Ranger levels, as shown in the Favored Enemy column of the Ranger Features table.

classFeatures.name: Weapon Mastery
classFeatures.description: Your training with weapons allows you to use the {@variantrule mastery properties|XPHB} of two kinds of weapons of your choice with which you have proficiency. Whenever you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}, you can practice weapon drills and change one of those weapon choices.

classFeatures.name: Deft Explorer
classFeatures.description: Thanks to your extensive wandering, you gain the following benefits.

details.expertise: {@b Expertise.} Choose two of your skill proficiencies with which you lack {@variantrule Expertise|XPHB}. You gain {@variantrule Expertise|XPHB} in those skills.
details.languages: {@b Languages.} You learn two languages of your choice.

classFeatures.name: Fighting Style
classFeatures.description: You gain a {@feat Fighting Style|XPHB} feat of your choice. {@feat Archery|XPHB} is recommended. Whenever you gain a Ranger level, you can replace the feat you chose with a different {@feat Fighting Style|XPHB} feat.

classFeatures.name: Ranger Subclass
classFeatures.description: You gain a Ranger subclass of your choice. A subclass is a specialization that grants you features at certain Ranger levels. For the rest of your career, you gain each of your subclass's features that are of your Ranger level or lower.

classFeatures.name: Ability Score Improvement
classFeatures.description: You gain the {@feat Ability Score Improvement|XPHB} feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. You gain this feature again at Ranger levels 8, 12, and 16.

classFeatures.name: Extra Attack
classFeatures.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the {@action Attack|XPHB} action on your turn.

classFeatures.name: Subclass Feature
classFeatures.description: You gain a feature from your Ranger subclass.

classFeatures.name: Subclass Feature
classFeatures.description: You gain a feature from your Ranger subclass.

classFeatures.name: Subclass Feature
classFeatures.description: You gain a feature from your Ranger subclass.

classFeatures.name: Epic Boon
classFeatures.description: You gain an {@variantrule Epic Boon|XPHB} feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. {@feat Boon of Dimensional Travel|XPHB} is recommended.
